front.title: Forward Secure Reauthentication in the Extensible Authentication Protocol Method for Authentication and Key Agreement (EAP-AKA')

abstract.t: This draft specifies an update to RFC 9678, "Forward Secrecy Extension to the Improved Extensible Authentication Protocol Method for Authentication and Key Agreement (EAP-AKA' FS)", and its predecessors RFC 9048, RFC 5448, and RFC 4187. This update enables forward security of the Transient EAP Keys (TEKs) for protecting EAP packets, which are not in EAP-AKA' FS. Based on this extension, the executions of reauthentication after a full authentication will be unlinkable to each other and then the privacy of end users is enhanced. This udapte is optional to the above standards.
